scheme_name: Nippon India Large Cap Fund Direct Growth

sections.overview: Key Information: | Category: Equity - Large Cap. | Riskometer: Very High Risk.
sections.exit_load: 1% if redeemed or switched out on or before 7 days from the date of allotment; Nil (0%) if redeemed or switched out after 7 days from allotment.
sections.minimum_investment: Minimum SIP: Rs. 100 per month.. Minimum Lumpsum: Rs. 100.
sections.tax: Taxation rules for Equity schemes: Short Term Capital Gains (STCG) are taxed at 15% if units are redeemed within 1 year. Long Term Capital Gains (LTCG) are taxed at 10% (without indexation) on gains exceeding Rs. 1 lakh per financial year, provided units are held for more than 1 year.
sections.fund_management:
- Sailesh Raj Bhan: Lead Fund Manager. Over 27 years of experience in equity research and fund management. Managing the fund since its inception in 2007.
- Bhavik Dave: Co-Fund Manager. Over 12 years of experience in financial services and equity analysis. Managing the fund since March 2020.
- Kinjal Desai: Dedicated Fund Manager for Overseas Investments. Over 10 years of experience in tracking international markets.
- Amber Singhania: Co-Fund Manager. Dedicated analyst and fund manager with over 15 years of industry experience.
sections.investment_objective: The primary investment objective of the scheme is to seek long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity-related instruments of large-cap companies.
sections.fund_house: Nippon India Mutual Fund (formerly Reliance Mutual Fund) is one of India's leading mutual fund houses. It is sponsored by Nippon Life Insurance Company of Japan, one of the largest life insurers in the world. The AMC is registered under SEBI and manages a diverse range of mutual fund schemes.
